# Casais Fleet Intelligence

Sistema de Gestão Inteligente de Frotas Industriais para o Grupo Casais. Focado em retrofit IoT, manutenção preditiva e integração Procore.

## Quick Context
- **Stack**: React 19 (PWA), Firebase (Functions v2/Firestore), Arduino (RFID Hardware).
- **Core Goal**: Track machine hours to calculate CO2, costs, and maintenance alerts (>150h).
- **ERP Integration**: Bi-directional sync with Procore (Timecards, Equipment, Logs).
- **Key Identity**: The "Arqueólogo-Mestre" protocol ensures documentation integrity.

## Directory Structure
- `/Frontend_App/dashboard`: React PWA Dashboard.
- `/Backend_Cloud`: Firebase infrastructure and Procore Bridge.
- `/arduino_rfid_simple`: RFID sensor logic and LED status feedback.
- `/Hardware_Bridge_PC`: Serial-to-Cloud Python bridge.
- `/docs`: Technical and Design specifications.

## Critical Docs
- `README.md`: Entry point.
- `DOCS_HISTORY.md`: Session logs and decisions.
- `DOCS_ARCHITECTURE.md`: Technical master file.
- `DOCS_ROADMAP.md`: Feature matrix and progress.
- `DOCS_OPERATIONS.md`: Deployment and setup.
- `AJUDA_COMANDOS.md`: User cheat sheet for agents and commands.
- `docs/standards/FIREBASE_SCHEMAS.md`: MANDATORY for DB changes.
- `docs/standards/CODE_PATTERNS.md`: MANDATORY for Code/UI style.

## Current Status
- ✅ Procore Sync & Writeback (Phase 3) Operational.
- ✅ Dynamic Operational Parameters (Diesel/CO2/Maintenance).
- ✅ Machine-as-Hub (NFC Mobile) Operational.
- 🟡 Manutenção Preditiva (Sede) - Atribuído ao Claude Code.
- 🔴 Gemini: BLOQUEIO TOTAL DE CÓDIGO FONTE ATIVO.

> For deep technical logic, refer to `DOCS_ARCHITECTURE.md`.
